9.description: (Color online) The Impact of the Number of Drivers on Expected Customer Delay Under the Nearest Dispatching Policy Notes. The results pertain to a system in which μ ( m , q ) is given by ( 4 ) if q ≤ n and μ ( m , q ) = 1 / ( ( s / ( m − n + 1 ) ( q − n ) ) + s ) otherwise. The approximation is asymptotically exact (up to a geometry-dependent coefficient) when the origin–destination pair associated with each requested trip is uniformly distributed over a square service region. See theorem 5 in Wang et al. (2022) for the validation and more discussions. (a) Intermediate regime: m = 120, λ = 10, and s = 10. (b) Supply-rich regime: m = 220, λ = 10, and s = 10.
